# Aeternum Advisors — Website

Single-file static site. `index.html` is self-contained (all JS, CSS, fonts and images bundled inline).

## Deploy to Vercel

1. Push this folder to a new GitHub repository.
2. Go to https://vercel.com/new and import the repo.
3. Vercel auto-detects a static site — no build command needed.
4. Click **Deploy**.

## Deploy anywhere else

Just upload `index.html` to any static host (Netlify, Cloudflare Pages, GitHub Pages, S3+CloudFront, etc.). No build step required.

## Local preview

Open `index.html` in a browser — it works offline.
